name: Grakata
description: Equipped with a huge Magazine and impressive Fire Rate, the Grakata is the preferred weapon of Grineer Lancers.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Equipped with a huge Magazine and impressive Fire Rate, the Grakata is the preferred weapon of Grineer Lancers.

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Kahl’s Grakata sticking straight up after throwing Incendiary Grenades while scooting around on jetpack.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Kahl losing the ability to use the Grattler after dropping it by switching to his Grakata and then dying in the Veilbreaker Quest. 
Fixed leaving your Grakata on the ground after picking up the Grattler in the Veilbreaker Quest.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Kahl’s Grakata appearing entirely orange in the end of mission screen.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Twin Grakatas reload animation.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Grakata Day of the Dead Skin

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Increased the Status Chance of the Twin Grakatas to match their mechanic of firing 2 rounds at once.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.2 + 23.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed icon missing for the Prisma Grakata.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Grineer Lancer Grakata reload animation.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed using the Viper with the Skull Shots Mod or a Grakata with the Brain Storm Mod, activating the headshot bonus with the final shot in your magazine resulting in the weapon to fire much faster than intended in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.changes: Thought the Grakata couldn’t get any better? Well now it’s firepower sounds even more satisfying! We’ve improved it’s 3D sound to use stereo samples, which gives the Grakata a meatier sound when in close proximity to it. This gives ally and enemy Grakatas a more dynamic feel in 3D! Clem will be pleased.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Towsun Skin Collection in the French client incorrectly mentioning Grakatas as part of the bundle.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.changes:
Grakata 60 to 40
Prisma Grakata 120 to 50
Twin Grakatas 120 to 60

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the flashlight on the Twin Grakatas & Dual Cestra

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the hips of Warframe’s appearing to stretch when playing Agile Akimbo, (Twin Vipers, Twin Grakatas, etc) Bow, and Pistol idles.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with Prisma Grakata weapon model missing a magazine.
Fixed an issue with Clem not properly firing his Twin Grakata’s in his quest mission.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Brain Storm (Grakata) 
Increased the ammo pool of Dual Grakatas in Conclave.
Fixed the Grakata, Prisma Grakata, and Embolist improperly using the Ignis’ reload animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: Increased the ammo pool of the Prisma Grakata in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Twin Grakata damage reduced in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Added unique reload sounds to the Twin Grakatas.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Twin Grakatas and Ack & Brunt not properly using player’s custom Energy color.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Updated reload audio effects on the Twin Grakatas.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Twin Grakata’s second weapon not having a proper animations.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes:
Twin Grakata 
When one Grakata isn't enough, bring another for extra firepower.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.8.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Prisma Grakata not being tradable.
Fixed the Prisma Grakata not showing in Codex.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes:
Grakata damage increased in PvP.
Grakata has been given the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.7
patchlogs.changes: Updated audio quality on the Grakata.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Grakata and Ignis not properly aiming if the player attempted to aim while in the middle of a reload animation

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed weapons that played reload sounds twice (Ignis, Grakata, Embolist)

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Added custom reload sounds for Strun, Dera, Supra, Gorgon, Ignis, Grakata, Acrid, Kraken, Hek, and Lex.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.9.0: The Glaive
patchlogs.changes: Increased base Crit Chance and Damage on Grakata.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Grineer Lancers are now deployed with the Grakata assault rifle
